name: External control input state
description: Specifies which external inputs are currently asserted.
comment: High confidence: External control input state bitmask (8 inputs). Bits: 0=CDC, 1=GH Fan Hi, 2=GL Fan Lo, 3=B Reverse Valve, 4=Y Compressor, 5=W Heater, 6=Y2 Compressor Stage 2. Extract individual bits to create multiple binary_sensor entities.

name: External control input override
description: Allows assertion of external control inputs - if a bit is set in this ERD it is OR'd into 0x7120
comment: Medium confidence: External control input override register. Writable bitmask corresponding to 0x7120; sets bits OR'd into the external input state.

name: Central desk control
description: Central desk input - if set unit operation is suspended

values.0: CDC input is clear - unit operates normally
values.1: CDC input is asserted - unit operation is suspended

comment: Medium confidence: Central desk control state; if set, unit operation is suspended.

name: External Thermostat Mode
description: The current mode of the external thermostat.
comment: Medium confidence: External thermostat mode enum. See data[].values for mapping.

name: Outdoor Fan Count
description: Outdoor Fan Count.
comment: Medium confidence: Outdoor fan count.

name: Inside fan speed
description: Current inside fan speed in rpm. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Indoor fan actual speed in RPM; description explicitly states 'in rpm'.

name: Outside fan speed
description: Current outside fan speed in rpm. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Outdoor fan actual speed in RPM; description explicitly states 'in rpm'.

name: Inside target fan speed
description: Current target inside fan speed in rpm. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Indoor fan target speed in RPM; similar to 0x7130.

name: Outside target fan speed
description: Current target outside fan speed in rpm. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Outdoor fan target speed in RPM; similar to 0x7131.

name: Inside fan PWM
description: Current inside fan PWM value
comment: High confidence: Indoor fan PWM duty cycle; YAML divides raw value by 100. Raw 0-10000 = 0-100%. Divide by 100 to get percentage.

name: Outside fan PWM
description: Current outside fan PWM value
comment: High confidence: Outdoor fan PWM duty cycle; YAML divides raw value by 100. Raw 0-10000 = 0-100%. Divide by 100 to get percentage.

name: Outdoor Fan 2 Speed
description: Outdoor Fan 2 Speed.
comment: High confidence: Outdoor fan 2 actual speed in RPM; similar to 0x7131.

name: Outdoor Fan 2 Target Speed
description: Outdoor Fan 2 Target Speed.
comment: High confidence: Outdoor fan 2 target speed in RPM; similar to 0x7133.

name: Sealed system diagnostic
description: Indicates the reason for the sealed system control setting.

values.6: Internal Heating Stage 1 With Forced Boost
values.7: Internal Heating Stage 1 With No Heat Pump
values.9: Internal Heating Stage2 With No Heat Pump

comment: Sealed system diagnostic: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Heater diagnostic
description: Indicates the reason for the heater control setting.

values.6: Internal Heating Stage 1 With Forced Boost
values.7: Internal Heating Stage 1 With No Heat Pump
values.9: Internal Heating Stage2 With No Heat Pump

comment: Heater diagnostic: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Inside fan diagnostic
description: Indicates the reason for the inside fan control setting.

values.6: Internal Heating Stage 1 With Forced Boost
values.7: Internal Heating Stage 1 With No Heat Pump
values.9: Internal Heating Stage2 With No Heat Pump

comment: Inside fan diagnostic: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Outside fan diagnostic
description: Indicates the reason for the outside fan control setting.

values.6: Internal Heating Stage 1 With Forced Boost
values.7: Internal Heating Stage 1 With No Heat Pump
values.9: Internal Heating Stage2 With No Heat Pump

comment: Outside fan diagnostic: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Compressor state
description: The current state of the compressor
comment: Compressor state: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Sealed System Stage
description: The current sealed system stage.
comment: Sealed System Stage: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Resistance Heaters Active
description: Status of resistance heaters.
comment: Resistance Heaters Active: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Defrost Diagnostic
description: Indicates the reason for the defrost control setting.
comment: Defrost Diagnostic: Enum read-only sensor.

name: UVC Kit Enable
description: AUX setting to enable UVC Kit support
comment: UVC Kit Enable: Boolean writable switch.

name: Dehumidification Mode
description: AUX setting to control dehumidification. Unit must be reset for changes to take effect.
comment: Dehumidification Mode: Enum writable select.

name: Smart Fan Cooling
description: AUX setting to control smart fan mode during cooling
comment: Smart Fan Cooling: Boolean writable switch.

name: Smart Fan Heating
description: AUX setting to control smart fan mode during heating
comment: Smart Fan Heating: Boolean writable switch.

name: Freeze Sentinel
description: AUX setting to allow Freeze Sentinel
comment: Freeze Sentinel: Boolean writable switch.

name: Heat Sentinel
description: AUX setting to allow Heat Sentinel
comment: Heat Sentinel: Boolean writable switch.

name: Constant Fan State
description: AUX setting to control constant fan mode
comment: Constant Fan State: Boolean writable switch.

name: Cool Temperature Limit Mode
description: The limits cool temperature can be set between.
comment: Cool Temperature Limit Mode: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Heat Temperature Limit Mode
description: The limits heat temperature can be set between.
comment: Heat Temperature Limit Mode: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: External Thermostat
description: AUX setting to allow external thermostat control
comment: External Thermostat: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Duct Mode
description: AUX setting to configure duct mode
comment: Duct Mode: Boolean writable switch.

name: Electric Heat Only mode
description: AUX setting to control Electric Heat Only mode
comment: Electric Heat Only mode: Boolean writable switch.

name: Boost Heat Mode
description: AUX setting to control Boost Heat mode
comment: Boost Heat Mode: Boolean writable switch.

name: MUAM Fan Speed setting
description: AUX setting to control MUAM fan speed
comment: MUAM Fan Speed setting: Speed/RPM sensor.

name: MUAM Occupancy Enabled
description: AUX setting to configure MUAM Occupancy Enabled control
comment: MUAM Occupancy Enabled: Boolean writable switch.

name: Engineering Revision setup
description: AUX setting to configure Engineering Revision code
comment: Engineering Revision setup: Enum writable select.

name: Defrost Cycle Count
description: Count of Defrost Cycles run on unit.
comment: Defrost Cycle Count: Counter/count sensor.

name: Fan Configuration in Cooling Status
description: The device will publish the state of how the indoor fan operates when the appliance is in local control and in cooling mode
comment: High confidence: Smart Fan Cooling mode status; enum: 0=Cyclic, 1=Continuous. Paired with request ERD 0x7451.

name: Fan Configuration in Cooling Request
description: The client will request a change to how the indoor fan operates when the appliance is in local control and in cooling mode
comment: High confidence: Smart Fan Cooling mode request; write 0=Cyclic, 1=Continuous. Paired with status ERD 0x7450.

name: Fan Configuration in Heating Status
description: The device will publish the state of how the indoor fan operates when the appliance is in local control and in heating mode
comment: High confidence: Smart Fan Heating mode status; enum: 0=Cyclic, 1=Continuous. Paired with request ERD 0x7453.

name: Fan Configuration in Heating Request
description: The client will request a change to how the indoor fan operates when the appliance is in local control and in heating mode
comment: High confidence: Smart Fan Heating mode request; write 0=Cyclic, 1=Continuous. Paired with status ERD 0x7452.

name: Freeze Sentinel Status
description: The device will publish the Freeze Sentinel status
comment: High confidence: Freeze Sentinel enabled status; first byte 0x01=enabled, 0x00=disabled. Paired with request ERD 0x7455.

name: Freeze Sentinel Request
description: The client will request a change Freeze Sentinel status
comment: High confidence: Freeze Sentinel enable request; write 0x01=enable, 0x00=disable. Paired with status ERD 0x7454.

name: Heat Sentinel Status
description: The device will publish the Heat Sentinel Status
comment: High confidence: Overheat Sentinel enabled status; first byte 0x01=enabled, 0x00=disabled. Paired with request ERD 0x7457.

name: Heat Sentinel Request
description: The client will request a change the Heat Sentinel status
comment: High confidence: Overheat Sentinel enable request; write 0x01=enable, 0x00=disable. Paired with status ERD 0x7456.

name: Constant Fan Status
description: The device will publish the Constant Fan Status
comment: High confidence: Constant Fan enabled status; first byte 0x01=enabled, 0x00=disabled. Paired with request ERD 0x7459.

name: Constant Fan Request
description: The client will request a change to the Constant Fan status
comment: High confidence: Constant Fan enable request; write 0x01=enable, 0x00=disable. Paired with status ERD 0x7458.

name: 24V External Thermostat Status
description: The device will publish if the unit is configured to use a standard external thermostat that sends boolean 24V signals to control the unit (Fan, Compressor, Reversing Valve, etc)
comment: High confidence: External Thermostat enabled status; first byte 0x01=enabled, 0x00=disabled. Paired with request ERD 0x745b.

name: 24V External Thermostat Request
description: The client will request a change to the 24V External Thermostat Enabled Status
comment: High confidence: External Thermostat enable request; write 0x01=enable, 0x00=disable. Paired with status ERD 0x745a.

name: Fan Boost Status
description: The device will publish the current Fan Boost status
comment: High confidence: Boost Fan enabled status; first byte 0x01=enabled, 0x00=disabled. Paired with request ERD 0x745d.

name: Fan Boost Request
description: The client will request a change to the Fan Boost status
comment: High confidence: Boost Fan enable request; write 0x01=enable, 0x00=disable. Paired with status ERD 0x745c.

name: Heat Selector Status
description: The device will publish the current Heat Selector status

data.name: Allowed Selections.Boost Heat Pump Allowed Present

comment: High confidence: Heat Selector mode status; enum: 0=Electric Heat Only, 1=High Demand, 2=Hybrid, 3=Boost Heat Pump, 4=Heat Pump Only. Paired with request ERD 0x745f.

name: Heat Selector Request
description: The client will request a change to the Heat Selector status
comment: High confidence: Heat Selector mode request; write 0-4 to select mode. Paired with status ERD 0x745e.

name: Heat Selector Strict Status
description: The device will publish the Heat Selector Strict configuration. This feature is used to force the unit to only operate in heat pump only or boost heat pump mode.
comment: High confidence: Electric Heat Lockout (Strict) status; first byte 0x01=locked out, 0x00=not locked out.

name: UVC Module Status
description: The device will publish the UVC Module status.
comment: UVC Module Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: UVC Module Request
description: The client will request a change to UVC Module status.
comment: UVC Module Request: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Make-up Air Fan Cfm Status
description: The device will publish the current status of the Make-up Air Fan Cfm selection as well as the allowed inputs. Requests of 0 are always allowed

data.name: Make-up Air Allowed Cfm Values.Minimum Allowed Cfm
Make-up Air Allowed Cfm Values.Maximum Allowed Cfm
Make-up Air Allowed Cfm Values.Cfm Step Size

comment: High confidence: Make-up Air fan CFM status; u16, no scaling, raw value = actual CFM. Paired with request ERD 0x7465.

name: Make-up Air Fan Cfm Request
description: The client will request a change to Make-up Air Fan Cfm status. When the request is consumed, the device will set this Erd to 0xFFFF
comment: High confidence: Make-up Air fan CFM request; u16, no scaling. YAML shows min=0, max=70 CFM. Paired with status ERD 0x7464.

name: Make-up Air Filter Type Status
description: The device will publish the current Make-up Air Filter Type selected as well as the supported filter types.
comment: High confidence: Make-up Air Filter Setting status; enum: 0=No Filter, 1=MERV13 Filter. Paired with request ERD 0x7467.

name: Make-up Air Filter Type Request
description: The client will request a change to the Make-up Air Filter Type status
comment: High confidence: Make-up Air Filter Setting request; write 0=No Filter, 1=MERV13 Filter. Paired with status ERD 0x7466.

name: Make-up Air Occupancy Control Status
description: The device will publish the Make-up Air Occupancy Control feature status.
comment: High confidence: MUAM Occupancy Control enabled status; first byte 0x01=enabled, 0x00=disabled. Paired with request ERD 0x7469.

name: Make-up Air Occupancy Control Request
description: The client will request a change to the Make-up Air Occupancy Control status.
comment: High confidence: MUAM Occupancy Control enable request; write 0x01=enable, 0x00=disable. Paired with status ERD 0x7468.

name: Dehumidification Mode Status
description: The device will publish the current state of the Dehumidification Mode and all of the allowed modes.
comment: High confidence: Dehumidification Mode status; enum: 0=Off, 1=Low, 2=Standard, 3=High. Paired with request ERD 0x746b.

name: Dehumidification Mode Request
description: The client will request a change to the Dehumidification Mode status
comment: High confidence: Dehumidification Mode request; write 0=Off, 1=Low, 2=Standard, 3=High. Paired with status ERD 0x746a.

name: Auxiliary 24V Input Status
description: The device will publish the configuration status of the 24V auxiliary input.
comment: High confidence: CDC Configuration status; enum: 0=Central Desk Control, 1=Occupancy. Paired with request ERD 0x746d.

name: Auxiliary 24V Configuration Request
description: The client will request a change to the auxiliary 24V input configuration status
comment: High confidence: CDC Configuration request; write 0=Central Desk Control, 1=Occupancy. Paired with status ERD 0x746c.

name: Heat Pump Lockout Temperature Status
description: The device will publish the current Heat Pump Lockout Temperature and the limits for this value

data.name: Heat Pump Lockout Temperature Status.Heat Pump Lockout Temperature in Fahrenheit x 10
Heat Pump Lockout Temperature Status.Minimum Allowed Temperature in Fahrenheit x 10
Heat Pump Lockout Temperature Status.Maximum Allowed Temperature in Fahrenheit x 10

comment: Auto-suggested: Heat Pump Lockout Temperature Status (device_class inferred from name keyword, unit inferred from field name pattern, state_class inferred from device_class)

name: Heat Pump Lockout Temperature Request
description: The device will publish the current Heat Pump Lockout Temperature and the limits for this value

data.name: Heat Pump Lockout Temperature in Fahrenheit x 10

comment: Auto-suggested: Heat Pump Lockout Temperature Request (unit inferred from field name pattern)

name: Input Current Limiting Status
description: The device will publish the Input Current Limiting feature status.

data.name: User Set Input Current Limiting Status
Input Current Limiting Allowed Values.Min Input Current Limit
Input Current Limiting Allowed Values.Max Input Current Limit
Input Current Limiting Allowed Values.Step Size

comment: Auto-suggested: Input Current Limiting Status

name: Input Current Limiting Request
description: The client will request a change to the Input Current Limiting status.
comment: Auto-suggested: Input Current Limiting Request

name: Heat Source Optimization Status
description: The device will publish the Heat Source Optimization feature status.
comment: Auto-suggested: Heat Source Optimization Status

name: Heat Source Optimization Request
description: The client will request a change to the Heat Source Optimization status.
comment: Auto-suggested: Heat Source Optimization Request

name: External Thermostat fault state
description: The fault state of the external thermostat
comment: External Thermostat fault state: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Make-up Air fan 1 actual speed
description: Current make-up air fan 1 actual speed. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.

data.name: Make-up Air fan 1 actual speed RPM

comment: High confidence: Make-up Air fan 1 actual speed in RPM.

name: EEV Control Type
description: EEV control type.
comment: High confidence: EEV Control Type enum; 0=Idle, 1=Linear, 2=Constant, 3=Pi Control, 4=Pi Control High Gain. See data[].values.

name: EEV1 Desired Position
description: The desired position of EEV1.
comment: High confidence: EEV Desired Position in stepper motor steps.

name: EEV2 Desired Position
description: The desired position of EEV2.
comment: EEV2 Desired Position: Single numeric writable value.

name: EEV1 Actual Position
description: EEV stepper motor position for EEV1
comment: High confidence: EEV Actual Position in stepper motor steps (signed i16).

name: EEV2 Actual Position
description: EEV stepper motor position for EEV2
comment: EEV2 Actual Position: Single numeric writable value.

name: Target Superheat Temperature
description: The target superheat temperature.
comment: High confidence: EEV Target Superheat Temperature in degF x10. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.

name: Current Superheat Temperature
description: The current superheat temperature.
comment: High confidence: EEV Actual Superheat Temperature in degF x10. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.

name: EEV Linear Controller Desired Position
description: The desired position of the EEV linear controller.
comment: EEV Linear Controller Desired Position: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: EEV Controller Offset
description: The EEV controller offset.
comment: EEV Controller Offset: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Compressor Control Type
description: Compressor control type.
comment: High confidence: Compressor Control Type enum; 0=Idle, 1=Linear, 2=Constant, 3=Pi Control, 4=Pi Control High Gain. See data[].values.

name: Inverter Actual Speed RPM
description: Inverter Actual Speed RPM. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Compressor actual speed in RPM.

name: Inverter Desired Speed
description: Inverter Desired Speed. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Compressor target speed in RPM.

name: Inverter IGBT Power
description: Inverter IGBT Power.
comment: High confidence: Inverter power consumption; raw unsigned integer = actual Watts.

name: Inverter IGBT Temperature
description: The Inverter IGBT temperature.
comment: High confidence: IGBT temperature in degrees C x10. Divide raw value by 10 to get degC. The YAML converts to degF for display: ((value/10) * 9/5) + 32.

name: Power Status
description: The device will publish the current Power Enabled status of the appliance
comment: High confidence: Read-only bool reporting current power enabled state. Paired with request ERD 0x7701.

name: Power Request
description:
The client can request a change to the Power Enabled status.
Whether or not the request was accepted, the appliance resets this Erd to 0xFF as an indication the request was 'consumed' and have it ready for the next request.
comment: High confidence: Power on/off request. Write 0x01=on, 0x00=off. Value 0xFF means request was consumed. Paired with status ERD 0x7700.

name: System Mode Status
description: The device will publish the current System Mode status of the appliance
comment: High confidence: System mode status enum; YAML uses 1=Heat, 2=Fan, 3=Cool. Paired with request ERD 0x7703.

name: System Mode Request
description:
The client can request a change to the System Mode Status. Only System Modes that the device supports will be accepted.
Whether or not the request was accepted, the appliance resets this Erd to 0xFF as an indication the request was 'consumed' and have it ready for the next request.
comment: High confidence: System mode request; write 1=Heat, 2=Fan, 3=Cool. Value 0xFF means request was consumed. Paired with status ERD 0x7702.

name: System Mode Allowed
description: The device will publish what System Modes it supports. All reserved bits shall be cleared
comment: High confidence: Read-only bitmask of allowed system modes; useful for constraining the select options in ERD 0x7703.

name: Temperature Setpoint Step Size Status
description: The device shall publish the minimum step size that the device supports while in Fahrenheit or Celsius operation.

data.name: Minimum Step Size in Fahrenheit operation in Fahrenheit x 10
Minimum Step Size in Celsius operation in Celsius x 10

comment: High confidence: Temperature setpoint step size in DegreesFx10. Divide raw value by 10 for actual degF step size.

name: User Heating Setpoint Status
description: The device shall publish the current user heating setpoint temperature in DegreesFx10

data.name: User Heating Setpoint Temperature in Fahrenheit x 10

comment: High confidence: Read-only user heating setpoint in DegreesFx10. Divide raw u16 by 10 to get degF. Paired with request ERD 0x7707.

name: User Heating Setpoint Request
description:
The client can request a change to the User Heating Setpoint. Only User Heating Setpoints that the device allows will be accepted.
Whether or not the request was accepted, the appliance resets this Erd to 0x7FFF as an indication the request was 'consumed' and have it ready for the next request.

data.name: User Heating Setpoint Temperature in Fahrenheit x 10

comment: High confidence: Writable user heating setpoint request in DegreesFx10. Multiply desired degF by 10 before writing. Value 0x7FFF means request consumed. YAML shows min=60, max=85 degF. Paired with status ERD 0x7706.

name: User Heating Setpoint Configured Range
description: The device shall publish the maximum and minimum allowed User Heating Setpoint values.

data.name: User Heating Minimum Allowed Setpoint in Fahrenheit x 10
User Heating Maximum Allowed Setpoint in Fahrenheit x 10

comment: High confidence: Configured range for user heating setpoint; min/max in DegreesFx10. Divide by 10 for degF.

name: User Cooling Setpoint Status
description: The device shall publish the current user cooling setpoint temperature in DegreesFx10

data.name: User Cooling Setpoint Temperature in Fahrenheit x 10

comment: High confidence: Read-only user cooling setpoint in DegreesFx10. Divide raw u16 by 10 to get degF. Paired with request ERD 0x770a.

name: User Cooling Setpoint Request
description:
The client can request a change to the User Cooling Setpoint. Only User Cooling Setpoints that the device allows will be accepted.
Whether or not the request was accepted, the appliance resets this Erd to 0x7FFF as an indication the request was 'consumed' and have it ready for the next request.

data.name: User Cooling Setpoint Temperature in Fahrenheit x 10

comment: High confidence: Writable user cooling setpoint request in DegreesFx10. Multiply desired degF by 10 before writing. Value 0x7FFF means request consumed. YAML shows min=60, max=85 degF. Paired with status ERD 0x7709.
